description: Firefox enterprise policies.json (distribution/policies.json). Best-effort schema: Mozilla ships templates (mozilla/policy-templates) but no formal JSON Schema, and new policies are added every release, so this only models the general 'policies' envelope plus ExtensionSettings, the policy used to side-load unlisted/signed extensions outside AMO. See https://mozilla.github.io/policy-templates/ and https://github.com/mozilla/policy-templates for the full, ever-growing set of top-level policy keys.

install_url.description: file:// or https:// URL to a signed .xpi

ExtensionSettings.description: Keyed by extension ID (browser_specific_settings.gecko.id) or '*' for the default

title: Firefox distribution/policies.json
